_metadata.purpose: Baseline MFA enforcement for all users on all cloud applications. Sign-in frequency capped at 30 days to balance security and friction.
deployment_notes: Replace <user-id-break-glass> with break-glass account object ID.
Replace <group-id-service-accounts> with a security group containing all service accounts (no human users). Service accounts use other auth (managed identities, certificate auth).
If no service-account exclusion group exists, create one: az ad group create --display-name 'sg-service-accounts' --mail-nickname 'sg-service-accounts'
Deploy in report-only. After all users register MFA methods, switch to 'enabled'.
Pair with 'Require MFA registration' policy enforced at user creation (managed via Identity Protection).
